overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from an action-adventure game set in ancient times, showing a character walking through a desert canyon at night. The scene features wooden scaffolding structures built against rock walls, torch-lit areas with NPCs, and approaches a large gated tomb entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow canyon passage with wooden scaffolding and torch cart

agents.ego_description: walking past two NPCs standing near a torch cart in a narrow canyon passage with scaffolding on the left

notable_agents.action: two individuals standing near a torch cart, one holding a staff and the other leaning against the cart

entered.detail: tall multi-level wooden scaffolding structure built against the rock face with horizontal planks
wooden cart with multiple burning torches providing warm orange light
tall sandstone rock formation with layered striations forming the canyon wall
leafless tree trunk with twisted branches silhouetted against the rock wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow desert canyon at night, with the character walking past two NPCs standing near a torch-lit cart. Large wooden scaffolding structures rise on the left against the rock wall, while the path ahead is illuminated by the warm glow of the torches against the cool blue night.

scene_state.functional_zone: open canyon path with wooden shelter and horse

events.description: camera turns right away from the torch cart and NPCs, heading down the canyon path
passing a wooden shelter with a horse tied to a post on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking along the wider canyon path toward a distant gated structure, moving away from the initial scaffolding area

notable_agents.action: horse tied to a wooden post under a small shelter, standing still

entered.detail: simple wooden canopy structure with posts providing shelter for the horse
dark-colored horse tethered to the shelter post
large metal gate structure built into the rock face at the end of the path

segments.scene_description: The character turns right and leaves the NPCs behind, entering a wider section of the canyon. The rock wall now runs along the left side while a wooden shelter with a tied horse appears on the right. In the distance, a large metal gate structure becomes visible at the canyon's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient tomb entrance with large metal gate and wooden platforms

events.description: approaching the large metal gate entrance built into the rock face

agents.ego_description: approaching the gated entrance to the tomb structure, moving toward the dark opening

entered.detail: lower wooden platforms and ladders built around the gate entrance for access
round stone containers or pillars flanking the gate entrance

segments.scene_description: The final segment focuses on the approach to the tomb entrance. The horse and shelter are left behind as the character moves toward the imposing metal gate built into the rock wall. Wooden scaffolding platforms line the left side, and the gate looms larger as the camera approaches the dark entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow desert canyon at night that gradually opens up toward a massive gated tomb entrance. It begins with the character walking past NPCs and a torch-lit cart, where the warm glow of fire contrasts with the cool blue night against towering wooden scaffolding. As the character turns right and leaves the camp behind, the canyon widens to reveal a wooden shelter with a tied horse on the right and a distant metal gate appearing at the end of the path. The scene then shifts focus toward the imposing structure as the horse and shelter recede, moving past further scaffolding platforms that line the rock wall. Finally, the camera closes in on the looming metal gate, bringing the character directly to the dark entrance of the tomb.
